title: Try, Try Again
lesson: If you fall down, you can get back up and try again.
prompts: On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting on a red BMX-style pedal bicycle with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, both feet resting on the pedals, wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, with an excited smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} stands nearby, one hand resting gently on the bicycle seat, smiling encouragingly. Make the interaction read physically: the father's hand rests on the bicycle seat the child sits on, his gaze on the child, while the child looks ahead over the handlebars. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is wobbling on the red BMX-style pedal bicycle with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, leaning slightly to one side with a surprised expression. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} stands nearby, reaching out a hand, looking watchful and ready to help. Make the interaction read physically: the father's reaching hand and watchful gaze follow the wobbling child on the bicycle. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — after a gentle tumble, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting safely on the green grass a full step in front of an empty red BMX-style pedal bicycle toppled on its side, the bicycle's diamond frame and exactly two wheels total visible, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, round pedals, and crank clearly visible, still wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, with a tiny pout but no tears. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels nearby, leaning in kindly and offering an open hand. Make the interaction read physically: the father's open hand reaches toward the seated child and the child looks up toward that offered hand. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing on the grass with both feet flat on the ground, wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, bending slightly to brush grass off one knee with both hands and a determined little smile; a separate empty red BMX-style pedal bicycle rests upright beside them, with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} crouches nearby, clapping and cheering them on warmly. Make the interaction read physically: the father turns toward the child clapping while the child glances back toward the father, encouraged. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is riding the red BMX-style pedal bicycle a short way, with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, beaming with delight, feet lifted from the ground. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} stands in the background, cheering with both arms raised, with an excited, proud expression. Make the interaction read physically: the father faces the riding child with both arms raised in cheer while the child rides toward him. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing proudly while holding the handlebar of the red BMX-style pedal bicycle, only the bicycle's handlebar, front fork, one front tire, pedals, and crank visible in the tighter frame, wearing a snug bright blue safety helmet, with a big happy smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels nearby, cheering and giving a thumbs-up with a proud, delighted expression. Make the interaction read physically: the father turns toward the child with a thumbs-up while the child looks back toward him, both sharing the proud moment by the bicycle. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: On a sunny park path, the child sits on a little red two-wheel pedal bike wearing a bright blue helmet, excited, while the father rests a hand on the bike encouragingly and gets them ready to ride.
On the park path, the child wobbles on the red two-wheel pedal bike while wearing the bright blue helmet, leaning to one side with a surprised look, while the father reaches out, ready to help.

On the park path after a gentle tumble, the child sits safely on the grass beside the red two-wheel pedal bike, still wearing the bright blue helmet and showing a small pout but no tears, while the father kneels offering an open hand.

On the park path, the child stands back up beside the red two-wheel pedal bike in the bright blue helmet, brushing off grass with a determined smile, while the father crouches clapping and cheering them on to try again.
On the park path, the child rides the red two-wheel pedal bike a short way in the bright blue helmet, beaming, while the father further back cheers with arms raised as the child succeeds.
On the park path, the child stands proudly by the red two-wheel pedal bike in the bright blue helmet, grinning big, while the father kneels giving a proud thumbs-up because the child never gave up.
texts: {NAME} sat on a little red two-wheel bike, bright blue helmet on tight. "I'm ready to ride!" said {NAME}. "Steady and brave," said Dad, smiling beside the bike.
{NAME} pushed off in the bright blue helmet, but wibble, wobble! "Whoa!" cried {NAME}. "I've got a hand close by," called Dad. "Keep looking ahead," he said.
Down {NAME} went onto the soft green grass, with the bright blue helmet still snug. Dad knelt and held out his hand. "I can't do it," {NAME} sighed. "Falling is part of learning," said Dad.
Dad clapped beside the bike as {NAME} brushed grass from one knee. "Try again when the brave feeling comes," he said kindly. "Okay," said {NAME}. "My blue helmet is ready too."
{NAME} pushed off once more in the bright blue helmet and — was riding! "Look at me go!" laughed {NAME}. "Hooray!" cheered Dad, arms up high. "You tried again!"
{NAME} stood proudly by the red two-wheel bike with a great big grin under the bright blue helmet. "Great riding!" said Dad. "I never gave up!" said {NAME}.
